title: Viper (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Viper''''' was a group of three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intrepid (Imperial I-class)|''Intrepid'']]{{'s}} [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was damaged in an accidental collision with an [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]], leaving it stranded in the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous system]], ''Viper'' group was sent, along with several [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] to reinforce it.

However, before the group could reach the ''Intrepid'', they were [[Battle of the Circarpous system (Galactic Civil War)|attacked]] at the edge of the system by a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]], led by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], escorted by [[Ernek Marskan]] in an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]]. Although the ''Intrepid'' sent [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]] to help, all of ''Viper'' group was destroyed before they could reach the Star Destroyer.

After the Battle of Yavin a group of corvettes named Viper came across the Frigate Anvil being [[Defense of the Anvil|evacuated]]. Keyan Farlander managed to destroy them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]'' {{1st}}
